holdings.infoBox: SRET is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple Hospitality REIT stock at 4.40%, Sila Realty Trust at 4.26%, Healthcare Realty Trust at 4.03%, Getty Realty at 3.81%, and Broadstone Net Lease at 3.76%.

overview.description: The Global X SuperDividend REIT ETF (SRET) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive Global Superdividend REIT index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of REITs from around the world. The fund selects 30 companies the issuer determines to have the highest yield and lowest volatility. SRET was launched on Mar 17, 2015 and is issued by Global X.
